findings.title: Page title mismatch

I ran a reliability audit on https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/2 and found the following issues.

After fixing all issues, make sure the site works correctly on both desktop (1280px) and mobile (390px) viewports.

name: AutoTrader
notes: Cloudflare or equivalent bot protection active — this is a site configuration issue, not an engine failure

findings.title: Truncated text
findings.description: The visible text is truncated to 500 characters, which may not be sufficient to fully understand the issue.
findings.fix_prompt: Ensure that the visible text is not truncated and provide a clear and complete message to the user.

findings.title: Missing functionality
findings.description: The 'Click to reveal' button does not have a clear purpose or functionality.
findings.fix_prompt: Add a clear purpose or functionality to the 'Click to reveal' button or remove it if it's not necessary.

findings.title: Missing alt text
findings.description: The images on the page are missing alt text, which can affect accessibility for visually impaired users.
findings.fix_prompt: Add alt text to all images on the page to improve accessibility.

findings.title: Unclear error message
findings.description: The error message is not clear or concise, which may confuse users.
findings.fix_prompt: Provide a clear and concise error message that explains the issue and the solution.

raw_status.summary: The page has some minor issues with content, functionality, and accessibility, but overall it is well-structured and clear. The issues found are related to truncated text, missing functionality, missing alt text, and unclear error messages.
raw_status.bundled_fix_prompt:
I ran a reliability audit on https://www.autotrader.co.uk/ and found the following issues.
Please fix all of them:

1. [LOW] Truncated text
   Fix: Ensure that the visible text is not truncated and provide a clear and complete message to the user.

2. [LOW] Missing functionality
   Fix: Add a clear purpose or functionality to the 'Click to reveal' button or remove it if it's not necessary.

3. [LOW] Missing alt text
   Fix: Add alt text to all images on the page to improve accessibility.

4. [MEDIUM] Unclear error message
   Fix: Provide a clear and concise error message that explains the issue and the solution.

After fixing all issues, make sure the site works correctly on both desktop (1280px) and mobile (390px) viewports.

Journey context:
